TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: cicekaay sama sicekaay sama mitesekay nipangangnan Cirsium japonicum Kitam. var. takaoense sapamata a ngangan sapamata balu ŤŹäÁßĎ tungusay a ngangan (ŚĪ¨Śźć tungusay cicekaay a samaŤĖäŚĪ¨ u ngangan ťõěťĀéŚąļ, ,ŚĪĪŤÄĀťľ† ci-kuw-ce, ta-ce-al-lay, ta-ce-kay, law-bu-ce, ce-luw-puw, niw-ca-kuw, ci-mu-ce, ta-e-ci-puw, buyu'ay edu. Amilika a ngangan Japanese Thistle Herb or Root kamu nu binacadan ŚłÉŤĺ≤ Kakaunan,śííŚ•áŤźäťõÖ Cicekaay Sama,ť≠ĮŚáĪ Dulealeace,śéíÁĀ£ 'Sama,ťĄí 'Acipi Tarakuka,ťėŅÁĺé Sa Ma Nu Ru Duk Bunun Kakaunan, Sakizaya cicekaay Sama, Lukay Dulealeace, Paywan 'Sama, Cou 'Acipi Tarakuka, Amis Sa Ma Nu Ru Duk. kaliwaliwah nu hekal sicekaay sama ahebal ku kaliwawah, u langaw tini i Cung-kuw mililis tu bayu, manamuh tu sapi'ay, a demiad i Taywan hina liwaliwah i maapilisay a buyu', zazan nu nipalumaan, miduduc tu bayu nu sidamekay a kakitizaan a lala'. (u kamu nu Hulam: .) kakapah nu sapayu sicekaay sama sicedam panihew, taneng pasapi' tu izang sapihulak tu ledek, taneng aca palasawad tu malibawaay madukaay, angangan mingaay tu manana'aya a atay, manana'ay a buwa', maizang ku tawawaan a imelangan, taneng mala sapa'yu aca nu ihekalay a duka. (kamu nu Hulam: .) mipayuay a binacadan Bunun, Sakizaya, Lukay, Cou, Amis, Paywan. (kamu nu Hulam: ) wayway nu mulangaway sicekaay sama nu sapamata a baluan u panaay tu a mihcaan nu mulangaway a lutuk, u talakaw pakala tu 30-120 hunan . lamit masamulmul, u tanayu' 0.5-1 hunan, akaway nu papah, masa aenengan nu lyen-huwa, u papah siceka anucaay sa masati'kuk ku kamulmul 10-35 hunan ku tanayu', lilis nu papah masalutalut, tukun nu lutalut siceka', landaw ku papah, satulistulis sa sibanuh, belih nu papah abuabuan kaladaw ku kulit, ulat nu papah sibanuh, pabaway adidi' ku papah. sicekaay sama u lalud ku kasibaluan, masatangah ku silut nu balu, tabuay nu balu mahiza u tuki, 1-2 hunan ku tanayu', 2-4 hunan ku ahebal, hekalay a bangs teban sicupenat. balu masatangah ku balu, kalutiman ku kasumanah, lima ku pela' nu balu, tama lima ku tebanay a luy. Sicekaay sama u heci makudus masatanayu' ku kamulmul, 0.3 hunan ku tanayu' abuabuan ku duut nu kulit. masasilsil ku balu, mabadibadi', u tabu nu balu kalawlaw sa mabadi' u hekal kasa lutilutimay ka lumeni', salengacan adiping a banuh i hekal tu. u sapaluma atu milisal tu angangan paluma, mipili' tu lala' misazay tu lala', mipili' tu silidungay, ilabuay kibetulay a lala' sidamekay silikenay a lala' pasapal, mahamin patadas malauk hawsa pengpeng hantu amisazay, misabawbi, u ahebal pakala tu 1 mi, u talakaw 15 lim ku talakaw, apuyu'ay tanayu'ay kapah tu. sapaluma' a salangaw, kau ayzaay mihcaan anialaan ku sapaluma, zayhan nu cilal a mihcaay ku sapaluma hawsa caay tu kakapah ku nilangaw, anu caay ka hamin ku nu ayzaay a mihcaan, singa'han i cidetay maacakay a kakitizaan. pipasapalan tu sadingsingan 3-4 a bula, balangbangan tu 8-9 a bulad. sadingsingan u pisapalan, balangbangan palutu sapal. mikutkut tu sapaluma u laed 20 limix35 limi, sacacay han ku nipaluma tu sapal, u laed 30 lim,misacilis 2 limi ka i labu, mamin paluma hawsa basbas han ku lala' tu nanum, taxtudung nu akuti' tu 20-25a demiad pahkal t uku sapal. lisal bhan ku angangan paluma, i 3-4 a bulad kutkut han ku maikesay a angangan lamit, sai'han miala ku lamit attu adidi'ay a masaastiladay a angangan nu milutucey a sapaluma, u laed 35 lim, u laed nu tapangan 20 li-mi, namamin paluma basbas han tu nanum, lalemeden t uku lala' kya a kapah. nipalumaan bibelisw han ku lutuk, sicekaay sama dadawa mulangaw tabaki, paymihcaan miazih tu katanayu' nu lutuk kya a kinapina mibilsiw tu lutuk, saayawy paluma miyung tu kalisiw sapadamek, sapulung tu nikalukan nibelisiwan, u tai' nu tademaw atu nu nipahabayan a aadipan atu cin a damekan, nipalumaaan tu saapal kinatusa padamek. tusa tulu a mihcaan pilangawan tu sapal sa i sadingsing anucaay sayaw nu kasienawan padamek tu mazuhemay mamui'ay u damek tu maacakay a tai'. cicekaay samanayi' maazih ku midukaay a cilekay. ŤŅĹŤā•: .) misinga' a kawaw amisuped tapang angangan nu heci, i 9-10 a bulad uyza tusa, tuluay a mihcaan kulangaw kutkut han ku angangan heci, ala han ku lanu' hawsa paacak han anucaay kansuen miacak. tungusa nu lutuk a sapaiyuan u sasapaiyuan amin kya lutuk angangan u sapamata a ci a baluan nu mulangaway sicekaay sama. u sasnek. nu saapayu sicedam, sapi', micumud i atay, ipi'cin. (kamu nu Hulam: ÁĒė,ś∂ľ.ŚÖ•ŤāĚ,ŤĄĺÁ∂ď.) midaduy tu sapayu ananuman, ciyan han malakabi, 1.5 ciyan "u mantaay henay 1-2 lyang", tuktuk han cisalang anucaay melmelen. sapitabu i hekal, ya nituktukan sapitabu anucaay ya nituktukan a salang sipisipasip. kamu nu ayzaay a tademaw, taneng kau sicekaay sama cebus han tu nanum nananuman u sapingaay tu talakaway a izang nu tademaw. angangan nu sicekaay sama 3 kek, cebus tu nanum mala u nananuman, nika lalid anusaan munanum tu mahiniay amana kalakui't tu cacay a lalipayan. (kamu nu Hulam: . (kamu nu Hulam: .) tungusay siscekaay sama nu mulangaway pinaay tu a mihcaan nuyaanay tu nu mulangaway a lutu', malecad ku picidek u sicekaay amin ku uzip. sicekaay sama i nutawan a kanatal izaw amin mulangaw, u maazihay tu u sisalangay sama kasumamadan sicekaay sama mukan tu balu anucaay miala tu mahiniay a tuud, sicekaay sama nu Su-ke-lanay nu kanatal a balu. i Taywan, u tademaw amin caay katineng, tatenga', i Taywan a kalisiwnu malebut a kalisiw i belih nu tatipeluk a kalisiw, kawili sasa ya papah siceka', izaw ku lutimay a kulit nu adidi'ay a balu nu mulangaway, uyza kyami nu Taywan uyzaanay nu mulangaway tu a yI'-san nu sicekaay sama.
S.PHON: ¶i ¶…ôkaaj sama si ¶…ôkaaj sama mit…ôs…ôkaj nipaŇčaŇčnan ¶irsium japoni ¶um kitam. *ar. takao…ôns…ô sapamata a ŇčaŇčan sapamata bar~…ĺu ** tuŇčusaj a ŇčaŇčan (** tuŇčusaj ¶i ¶…ôkaaj a sama** u ŇčaŇčan ***, ,*** ¶i-kuw- ¶…ô, ta- ¶…ô-ar~…ĺ-r~…ĺaj, ta- ¶…ô-kaj, r~…ĺaw-bu- ¶…ô, ¶…ô-r~…ĺuw-puw, niw- ¶a-kuw, ¶i-mu- ¶…ô, ta-…ô- ¶i-puw, buju Ē~ °aj …ôdu. amir~…ĺika a ŇčaŇčan *apan…ôs…ô tńßistr~…ĺ…ô ńß…ôrb or *oot kamu nu bina ¶adan ** kakaunan,**** ¶i ¶…ôkaaj sama,** dur~…ĺ…ôar~…ĺ…ôa ¶…ô,** Ē~ °sama,* Ē~ °a ¶ipi tarakuka,** sa ma nu *u duk bunun kakaunan, sakizaja ¶i ¶…ôkaaj sama, r~…ĺukaj dur~…ĺ…ôar~…ĺ…ôa ¶…ô, pajwan Ē~ °sama, ¶ou Ē~ °a ¶ipi tarakuka, amis sa ma nu *u duk. kar~…ĺiwar~…ĺiwańß nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ si ¶…ôkaaj sama ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ku kar~…ĺiwawańß, u r~…ĺaŇčaw tini i ¶uŇč-kuw mir~…ĺir~…ĺis tu baju, manamuńß tu sapi Ē~ °aj, a d…ômiad i tajwan ńßina r~…ĺiwar~…ĺiwańß i maapir~…ĺisaj a buju Ē~ °, zazan nu nipar~…ĺumaan, midudu ¶ tu baju nu sidam…ôkaj a kakitizaan a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) kakapańß nu sapaju si ¶…ôkaaj sama si ¶…ôdam panińß…ôw, tan…ôŇč pasapi Ē~ ° tu izaŇč sapińßur~…ĺak tu r~…ĺ…ôd…ôk, tan…ôŇč a ¶a par~…ĺasawad tu mar~…ĺibawaaj madukaaj, aŇčaŇčan miŇčaaj tu manana Ē~ °aja a ataj, manana Ē~ °aj a buwa Ē~ °, maizaŇč ku tawawaan a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan, tan…ôŇč mar~…ĺa sapa Ē~ °ju a ¶a nu ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a duka. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) mipajuaj a bina ¶adan bunun, sakizaja, r~…ĺukaj, ¶ou, amis, pajwan. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: ) wajwaj nu mur~…ĺaŇčawaj si ¶…ôkaaj sama nu sapamata a bar~…ĺuan u panaaj tu a mińß ¶aan nu mur~…ĺaŇčawaj a r~…ĺutuk, u tar~…ĺakaw pakar~…ĺa tu **-*** ńßunan . r~…ĺamit masamur~…ĺmur~…ĺ, u tanaju Ē~ ° *.*-* ńßunan, akawaj nu papańß, masa a…ôn…ôŇčan nu r~…ĺj…ôn-ńßuwa, u papańß si ¶…ôka anu ¶aaj sa masati Ē~ °kuk ku kamur~…ĺmur~…ĺ **-** ńßunan ku tanaju Ē~ °, r~…ĺir~…ĺis nu papańß masar~…ĺutar~…ĺut, tukun nu r~…ĺutar~…ĺut si ¶…ôka Ē~ °, r~…ĺandaw ku papańß, satur~…ĺistur~…ĺis sa sibanuńß, b…ôr~…ĺińß nu papańß abuabuan kar~…ĺadaw ku kur~…ĺit, ur~…ĺat nu papańß sibanuńß, pabawaj adidi Ē~ ° ku papańß. si ¶…ôkaaj sama u r~…ĺar~…ĺud ku kasibar~…ĺuan, masataŇčańß ku sir~…ĺut nu bar~…ĺu, tabuaj nu bar~…ĺu mańßiza u tuki, *-* ńßunan ku tanaju Ē~ °, *-* ¶…ôkaaj sama u ńß…ô ¶i makudus masatanaju Ē~ ° ku kamur~…ĺmur~…ĺ, *.* ńßunan ku tanaju Ē~ ° abuabuan ku duut nu kur~…ĺit. masasir~…ĺsir~…ĺ ku bar~…ĺu, mabadibadi Ē~ °, u tabu nu bar~…ĺu kar~…ĺawr~…ĺaw sapar~…ĺuma u r~…ĺa…ôd ** r~…ĺimi*** r~…ĺimi, sa ¶a ¶aj ńßan ku nipar~…ĺuma tu sapar~…ĺ, u r~…ĺa…ôd ** r~…ĺim,misa ¶ir~…ĺis * r~…ĺimi ka i r~…ĺabu, mamin par~…ĺuma ńßawsa basbas ńßan ku r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôm…ôd…ôn t uku r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° kja a kapańß. nipar~…ĺumaan bib…ôr~…ĺisw ńßan ku r~…ĺutuk, si ¶…ôkaaj sama dadawa mur~…ĺaŇčaw tabaki, pajmińß ¶aan miazińß tu katanaju Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺutuk kja a kinapina mibir~…ĺsiw tu r~…ĺutuk, saajawj par~…ĺuma mijuŇč tu kar~…ĺisiw sapadam…ôk, sapur~…ĺuŇč tu nikar~…ĺukan nib…ôr~…ĺisiwan, u tai Ē~ ° nu tad…ômaw atu nu nipańßabajan a aadipan atu ¶in a dam…ôkan, nipar~…ĺumaaan tu saapar~…ĺ kinatusa padam…ôk. tusa tur~…ĺu a mińß ¶aan pir~…ĺaŇčawan tu sapar~…ĺ sa i sadiŇčsiŇč anu ¶aaj sajaw nu kasi…ônawan padam…ôk tu mazuńß…ômaj mamui Ē~ °aj u dam…ôk tu maa ¶akaj a tai Ē~ °. ¶i ¶…ôkaaj samanaji Ē~ ° maazińß ku midukaaj a ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj. **: .) misiŇča Ē~ ° a kawaw amisup…ôd tapaŇč aŇčaŇčan nu ńß…ô ¶i, i *-** a bur~…ĺad ujza tusa, tur~…ĺuaj a mińß ¶aan kur~…ĺaŇčaw kutkut ńßan ku aŇčaŇčan ńß…ô ¶i, ar~…ĺa ńßan ku r~…ĺanu Ē~ ° ńßawsa paa ¶ak ńßan anu ¶aaj kansu…ôn mia ¶ak. tuŇčusa nu r~…ĺutuk a sapaijuan u sasapaijuan amin kja r~…ĺutuk aŇčaŇčan u sapamata a ¶i a bar~…ĺuan nu mur~…ĺaŇčawaj si ¶…ôkaaj sama. u sasn…ôk. nu saapaju si ¶…ôdam, sapi Ē~ °, mi ¶umud i ataj, ipi Ē~ ° ¶in. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: *,*.**,**.) midaduj tu sapaju ananuman, ¶ijan ńßan mar~…ĺakabi, *.* ¶ijan "u mantaaj ńß…ônaj *-* r~…ĺjaŇč", tuktuk ńßan ¶isar~…ĺaŇč anu ¶aaj m…ôr~…ĺm…ôr~…ĺ…ôn. sapitabu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺ, ja nituktukan sapitabu anu ¶aaj ja nituktukan a sar~…ĺaŇč sipisipasip. kamu nu ajzaaj a tad…ômaw, tan…ôŇč kau si ¶…ôkaaj sama ¶…ôbus ńßan tu nanum nananuman u sapiŇčaaj tu tar~…ĺakawaj a izaŇč nu tad…ômaw. aŇčaŇčan nu si ¶…ôkaaj sama * k…ôk, ¶…ôbus tu nanum mar~…ĺa u nananuman, nika r~…ĺar~…ĺid anusaan munanum tu mańßiniaj amana kar~…ĺakui Ē~ °t tu ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺar~…ĺipajan. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: . (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) tuŇčusaj sis ¶…ôkaaj sama nu mur~…ĺaŇčawaj pinaaj tu a mińß ¶aan nujaanaj tu nu mur~…ĺaŇčawaj a r~…ĺutu Ē~ °, mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku pi ¶id…ôk u si ¶…ôkaaj amin ku uzip. si ¶…ôkaaj sama i nutawan a kanatar~…ĺ izaw amin mur~…ĺaŇčaw, u maazińßaj tu u sisar~…ĺaŇčaj sama kasumamadan si ¶…ôkaaj sama mukan tu bar~…ĺu anu ¶aaj miar~…ĺa tu mańßiniaj a tuud, si ¶…ôkaaj sama nu su-k…ô-r~…ĺanaj nu kanatar~…ĺ a bar~…ĺu. i tajwan, u tad…ômaw amin ¶aaj katin…ôŇč, tat…ôŇča Ē~ °, i tajwan a kar~…ĺisiwnu mar~…ĺ…ôbut a kar~…ĺisiw i b…ôr~…ĺińß nu tatip…ôr~…ĺuk a kar~…ĺisiw, kawir~…ĺi sasa ja papańß si ¶…ôka Ē~ °, izaw ku r~…ĺutimaj a kur~…ĺit nu adidi Ē~ °aj a bar~…ĺu nu mur~…ĺaŇčawaj, ujza kjami nu tajwan ujzaanaj nu mur~…ĺaŇčawaj tu a ji Ē~ °-san nu si ¶…ôkaaj sama.
S.FORM: cicekaay sama sicekaay sama mitesekay nipangangnan Cirsium japonicum Kitam. var. takaoense sapamata a ngangan sapamata balu ŤŹäÁßĎ tungusay a ngangan (ŚĪ¨Śźć tungusay cicekaay a samaŤĖäŚĪ¨ u ngangan ťõěťĀéŚąļ, ,ŚĪĪŤÄĀťľ† ci-kuw-ce, ta-ce-al-lay, ta-ce-kay, law-bu-ce, ce-luw-puw, niw-ca-kuw, ci-mu-ce, ta-e-ci-puw, buyu'ay edu. Amilika a ngangan Japanese Thistle Herb or Root kamu nu binacadan ŚłÉŤĺ≤ Kakaunan,śííŚ•áŤźäťõÖ Cicekaay Sama,ť≠ĮŚáĪ Dulealeace,śéíÁĀ£ 'Sama,ťĄí 'Acipi Tarakuka,ťėŅÁĺé Sa Ma Nu Ru Duk Bunun Kakaunan, Sakizaya cicekaay Sama, Lukay Dulealeace, Paywan 'Sama, Cou 'Acipi Tarakuka, Amis Sa Ma Nu Ru Duk. kaliwaliwah nu hekal sicekaay sama ahebal ku kaliwawah, u langaw tini i Cung-kuw mililis tu bayu, manamuh tu sapi'ay, a demiad i Taywan hina liwaliwah i maapilisay a buyu', zazan nu nipalumaan, miduduc tu bayu nu sidamekay a kakitizaan a lala'. (u kamu nu Hulam: .) kakapah nu sapayu sicekaay sama sicedam panihew, taneng pasapi' tu izang sapihulak tu ledek, taneng aca palasawad tu malibawaay madukaay, angangan mingaay tu manana'aya a atay, manana'ay a buwa', maizang ku tawawaan a imelangan, taneng mala sapa'yu aca nu ihekalay a duka. (kamu nu Hulam: .) mipayuay a binacadan Bunun, Sakizaya, Lukay, Cou, Amis, Paywan. (kamu nu Hulam: ) wayway nu mulangaway sicekaay sama nu sapamata a baluan u panaay tu a mihcaan nu mulangaway a lutuk, u talakaw pakala tu 30-120 hunan . lamit masamulmul, u tanayu' 0.5-1 hunan, akaway nu papah, masa aenengan nu lyen-huwa, u papah siceka anucaay sa masati'kuk ku kamulmul 10-35 hunan ku tanayu', lilis nu papah masalutalut, tukun nu lutalut siceka', landaw ku papah, satulistulis sa sibanuh, belih nu papah abuabuan kaladaw ku kulit, ulat nu papah sibanuh, pabaway adidi' ku papah. sicekaay sama u lalud ku kasibaluan, masatangah ku silut nu balu, tabuay nu balu mahiza u tuki, 1-2 hunan ku tanayu', 2-4 hunan ku ahebal, hekalay a bangs teban sicupenat. balu masatangah ku balu, kalutiman ku kasumanah, lima ku pela' nu balu, tama lima ku tebanay a luy. Sicekaay sama u heci makudus masatanayu' ku kamulmul, 0.3 hunan ku tanayu' abuabuan ku duut nu kulit. masasilsil ku balu, mabadibadi', u tabu nu balu kalawlaw sa mabadi' u hekal kasa lutilutimay ka lumeni', salengacan adiping a banuh i hekal tu. u sapaluma atu milisal tu angangan paluma, mipili' tu lala' misazay tu lala', mipili' tu silidungay, ilabuay kibetulay a lala' sidamekay silikenay a lala' pasapal, mahamin patadas malauk hawsa pengpeng hantu amisazay, misabawbi, u ahebal pakala tu 1 mi, u talakaw 15 lim ku talakaw, apuyu'ay tanayu'ay kapah tu. sapaluma' a salangaw, kau ayzaay mihcaan anialaan ku sapaluma, zayhan nu cilal a mihcaay ku sapaluma hawsa caay tu kakapah ku nilangaw, anu caay ka hamin ku nu ayzaay a mihcaan, singa'han i cidetay maacakay a kakitizaan. pipasapalan tu sadingsingan 3-4 a bula, balangbangan tu 8-9 a bulad. sadingsingan u pisapalan, balangbangan palutu sapal. mikutkut tu sapaluma u laed 20 limix35 limi, sacacay han ku nipaluma tu sapal, u laed 30 lim,misacilis 2 limi ka i labu, mamin paluma hawsa basbas han ku lala' tu nanum, taxtudung nu akuti' tu 20-25a demiad pahkal t uku sapal. lisal bhan ku angangan paluma, i 3-4 a bulad kutkut han ku maikesay a angangan lamit, sai'han miala ku lamit attu adidi'ay a masaastiladay a angangan nu milutucey a sapaluma, u laed 35 lim, u laed nu tapangan 20 li-mi, namamin paluma basbas han tu nanum, lalemeden t uku lala' kya a kapah. nipalumaan bibelisw han ku lutuk, sicekaay sama dadawa mulangaw tabaki, paymihcaan miazih tu katanayu' nu lutuk kya a kinapina mibilsiw tu lutuk, saayawy paluma miyung tu kalisiw sapadamek, sapulung tu nikalukan nibelisiwan, u tai' nu tademaw atu nu nipahabayan a aadipan atu cin a damekan, nipalumaaan tu saapal kinatusa padamek. tusa tulu a mihcaan pilangawan tu sapal sa i sadingsing anucaay sayaw nu kasienawan padamek tu mazuhemay mamui'ay u damek tu maacakay a tai'. cicekaay samanayi' maazih ku midukaay a cilekay. ŤŅĹŤā•: .) misinga' a kawaw amisuped tapang angangan nu heci, i 9-10 a bulad uyza tusa, tuluay a mihcaan kulangaw kutkut han ku angangan heci, ala han ku lanu' hawsa paacak han anucaay kansuen miacak. tungusa nu lutuk a sapaiyuan u sasapaiyuan amin kya lutuk angangan u sapamata a ci a baluan nu mulangaway sicekaay sama. u sasnek. nu saapayu sicedam, sapi', micumud i atay, ipi'cin. (kamu nu Hulam: ÁĒė,ś∂ľ.ŚÖ•ŤāĚ,ŤĄĺÁ∂ď.) midaduy tu sapayu ananuman, ciyan han malakabi, 1.5 ciyan "u mantaay henay 1-2 lyang", tuktuk han cisalang anucaay melmelen. sapitabu i hekal, ya nituktukan sapitabu anucaay ya nituktukan a salang sipisipasip. kamu nu ayzaay a tademaw, taneng kau sicekaay sama cebus han tu nanum nananuman u sapingaay tu talakaway a izang nu tademaw. angangan nu sicekaay sama 3 kek, cebus tu nanum mala u nananuman, nika lalid anusaan munanum tu mahiniay amana kalakui't tu cacay a lalipayan. (kamu nu Hulam: . (kamu nu Hulam: .) tungusay siscekaay sama nu mulangaway pinaay tu a mihcaan nuyaanay tu nu mulangaway a lutu', malecad ku picidek u sicekaay amin ku uzip. sicekaay sama i nutawan a kanatal izaw amin mulangaw, u maazihay tu u sisalangay sama kasumamadan sicekaay sama mukan tu balu anucaay miala tu mahiniay a tuud, sicekaay sama nu Su-ke-lanay nu kanatal a balu. i Taywan, u tademaw amin caay katineng, tatenga', i Taywan a kalisiwnu malebut a kalisiw i belih nu tatipeluk a kalisiw, kawili sasa ya papah siceka', izaw ku lutimay a kulit nu adidi'ay a balu nu mulangaway, uyza kyami nu Taywan uyzaanay nu mulangaway tu a yI'-san nu sicekaay sama.

(u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) kakapańß nu sapaju si ¶…ôkaaj sama si ¶…ôdam panińß…ôw, tan…ôŇč pasapi Ē~ ° tu izaŇč sapińßur~…ĺak tu r~…ĺ…ôd…ôk, tan…ôŇč a ¶a par~…ĺasawad tu mar~…ĺibawaaj madukaaj, aŇčaŇčan miŇčaaj tu manana Ē~ °aja a ataj, manana Ē~ °aj a buwa Ē~ °, maizaŇč ku tawawaan a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan, tan…ôŇč mar~…ĺa sapa Ē~ °ju a ¶a nu ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a duka. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) mipajuaj a bina ¶adan bunun, sakizaja, r~…ĺukaj, ¶ou, amis, pajwan. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: ) wajwaj nu mur~…ĺaŇčawaj si ¶…ôkaaj sama nu sapamata a bar~…ĺuan u panaaj tu a mińß ¶aan nu mur~…ĺaŇčawaj a r~…ĺutuk, u tar~…ĺakaw pakar~…ĺa tu **-*** ńßunan . r~…ĺamit r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôm…ôd…ôn t uku r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° kja a kapańß. nipar~…ĺumaan bib…ôr~…ĺisw ńßan ku r~…ĺutuk, si ¶…ôkaaj sama dadawa mur~…ĺaŇčaw tabaki, pajmińß ¶aan miazińß tu katanaju Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺutuk kja a ¶aan kur~…ĺaŇčaw kutkut ńßan ku aŇčaŇčan ńß…ô ¶i, ar~…ĺa ńßan ku r~…ĺanu Ē~ ° ńßawsa paa ¶ak ńßan anu ¶aaj kansu…ôn mia ¶ak. tuŇčusa nu r~…ĺutuk a sapaijuan u sasapaijuan amin kja r~…ĺutuk aŇčaŇčan u sapamata a ¶i a bar~…ĺuan nu mur~…ĺaŇčawaj si ¶…ôkaaj sama. u sasn…ôk. nu saapaju si ¶…ôdam, sapi Ē~ °, mi ¶umud i ataj, ipi Ē~ ° ¶in. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: *,*.**,**.) midaduj tu sapaju ananuman, ¶ijan ńßan mar~…ĺakabi, *.* ¶ijan "u mantaaj ńß…ônaj *-* r~…ĺjaŇč", tuktuk ńßan ¶isar~…ĺaŇč anu ¶aaj m…ôr~…ĺm…ôr~…ĺ…ôn. sapitabu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺ, ja nituktukan sapitabu anu ¶aaj ja nituktukan a sar~…ĺaŇč sipisipasip. kamu nu ajzaaj a tad…ômaw, tan…ôŇč kau si ¶…ôkaaj sama ¶…ôbus ńßan tu nanum nananuman u sapiŇčaaj tu tar~…ĺakawaj a izaŇč nu tad…ômaw. aŇčaŇčan nu si ¶…ôkaaj sama * k…ôk, ¶…ôbus tu nanum mar~…ĺa u nananuman, nika r~…ĺar~…ĺid anusaan munanum tu mańßiniaj amana kar~…ĺakui Ē~ °t tu ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺar~…ĺipajan. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: . (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) tuŇčusaj sis ¶…ôkaaj sama nu mur~…ĺaŇčawaj pinaaj tu a mińß ¶aan nujaanaj tu nu mur~…ĺaŇčawaj a r~…ĺutu Ē~ °, mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku pi ¶id…ôk u si ¶…ôkaaj amin ku uzip. si ¶…ôkaaj sama i nutawan a kanatar~…ĺ izaw amin mur~…ĺaŇčaw, u maazińßaj tu u sisar~…ĺaŇčaj sama kasumamadan si ¶…ôkaaj sama mukan tu bar~…ĺu anu ¶aaj miar~…ĺa tu mańßiniaj a tuud, si ¶…ôkaaj sama nu su-k…ô-r~…ĺanaj nu kanatar~…ĺ a bar~…ĺu. i tajwan, u tad…ômaw amin ¶aaj katin…ôŇč, tat…ôŇča Ē~ °, i tajwan a kar~…ĺisiwnu mar~…ĺ…ôbut a kar~…ĺisiw i b…ôr~…ĺińß nu tatip…ôr~…ĺuk a kar~…ĺisiw, kawir~…ĺi sasa ja papańß si ¶…ôka Ē~ °, izaw ku r~…ĺutimaj a kur~…ĺit nu adidi Ē~ °aj a bar~…ĺu nu mur~…ĺaŇčawaj, ujza kjami nu tajwan ujzaanaj nu mur~…ĺaŇčawaj tu a ji Ē~ °-san nu si ¶…ôkaaj sama.
